metadata.subject: The Fat Loss Secret They Don't Want You to Know
metadata.prompt: Create a compelling promotional email for the "Mean Clean Lean" ebook from Man vs Health. The email should be direct, no-nonsense, and align with the Man vs Health philosophy of nutrition-first approaches. Emphasize that this isn't another fad diet but a sustainable approach to fat loss through proper nutrition. Include elements about cutting through the BS of the diet industry, focusing on whole foods over processed junk, and getting lean without being miserable. Make it feel personal and conversational, like advice from a knowledgeable friend who's tired of seeing people get scammed by the diet industry. Include calls-to-action to download the ebook and mention it's backed by real nutrition science, not marketing hype.

metadata.title: Man vs Health Platform Capabilities Breakdown
